indicators_used.name: Defense Spending Trend (3-year)
indicators_used.description: 3-year trend in defense spending. Declining = less prepared.

indicators_used.name: Reserve-to-Active Military Ratio
indicators_used.description: Ratio of reserve to active military personnel. Aggregate only.

indicators_used.name: Industrial Capacity Utilization
indicators_used.description: High utilization = less surge capacity for crisis response.
